title: AgentLens: Production-Assessed Trajectory Reviews for Coding Agent Evaluation

official_release.inspection_note: Archive extraction succeeded. The pinned release contains the paper-linked Apache-2.0 benchmark implementation, README, IDE trajectory collector, Python evaluator, judge metrics/prompts, formal checks, comparison/reporting code, configurations, scenarios, and tests. README inspection confirmed the released open-source fold is a 16-scenario Java workflows fold with two personas. This is acquisition evidence only; no reproducibility or validity claim is made.
